metadata.description: Claude Code plugins collection by Yohei Nakanishi

plugins.name: devteam
plugins.description: Multi-agent development team orchestration with file-based message queues

plugins.name: genpptx
plugins.description: Generate PowerPoint presentations from content using Claude Code

plugins.name: mcpg
plugins.description: Generate MCP server scaffold and tool implementation code from a natural language description

plugins.name: mcpd
plugins.description: Diagnose MCP server configuration, connectivity, and available tools

plugins.name: mcpx
plugins.description: Interactively explore MCP server tools and their input schemas

plugins.name: mcpr
plugins.description: Run MCP server tools directly and inspect their responses

plugins.name: obsidian-archive
plugins.description: Automatically archive Claude Code session summaries to Obsidian
